title: viburnum cassinoides var. angustifolium
intro: Viburnum cassinoides var. angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leafed witherod, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of Viburnum cassinoides var. angustifolium include its use in treating various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Viburnum cassinoides var. angustifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viburnum cassinoides var. angustifolium can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other illnesses.
